heading: Corporate Circle
intro: Partner with PYT and invest in the next generation of Bay Area youth. Corporate gifts are tax-deductible and come with year-round recognition. Explore tiers below, or to discuss partnership, contact Managing Director Loryn Hatten at lhatten@pytnet.org

tiers.name: Spotlight Circle
tiers.description: Name and logo recognition online (suited to your preference).

tiers.name: Limelight Circle
tiers.description: Logo placement on printed programs, and a group of complimentary tickets to a production of your choice. Name and logo recognition online. Further benefits agreed tailored to your organisation.

tiers.name: Starlight Patrons
tiers.description: Logo placement on lobby signage, printed programs and a group of complimentary tickets to a production of your choice. Name and logo recognition online. Further benefits agreed tailored to your organisation.

tiers.name: Luminary Partners
tiers.description: Logo placement on lobby signage, printed programs and a group of complimentary tickets to a production of your choice. Name and logo recognition online. Further benefits agreed tailored to your organisation.

tiers.name: PYT Visionaries
tiers.description: Logo and name recognition and select copy across PYT materials on and offline. Presented and recognised as a founding partner to PYT. On stage recognition for every production and program. Select complimentary tickets to any production. Back stage and rehearsal tours. Further benefits agreed tailored to your organisation.
